textByHashes.313e0adb6a85815a0486ed98e3f94fe782df6512: Quit bugging me then! I got me some fish to catch!
textByHashes.95ec2dd78f24c25a4ba342037b626cde62f5bae7: Nuh uh dude. Less talk, more fishing!
textByHashes.c636312cf3f894edd2aca7aae000deb6d34216bd: Dude! Why should I help you? You like, might beat me! I'm not giving away my secrets like that dude Grampa Jack does!
textByHashes.d7427a215c91d4c5ec12b3ee3ae1b32685d97243: Who's Grampa Jack he says! He won this competition four years in a row! He lives in the house just outside the gate.
textByHashes.1585514e430cf156a6aee30a3928fea30bf5a9ed: Who's Grampa Jack she says! He won this competition four years in a row! He lives in the house just outside the gate.
textByHashes.b59a268955fdae289c458226060fd4f2534d423c: Who's Grampa Jack they say! He won this competition four years in a row! He lives in the house just outside the gate.
